children.name: hwRemotePoolTable
children.description:
Configuration table of the remote address pool.
                 The remote address pool must be configured on the local equipment in the following cases:
                   Users obtain IP addresses through the built-in DHCP client and need to renew the addresses.
                   The equipment needs to record the IP addresses to be renewed.
                   The equipment needs to report the routes of the users.

children.name: hwDapSubnetStatusTable
children.description: The table of dap-server ip pool subnet status.

children.name: hwIPv6PoolVpnStatusTable
children.description: IPv6 address pool usage statistics list of vpn.

children.name: hwDapV6PoolStatusTable
children.description: The table of dap-server ipv6 pool status.

children.name: hwIPv6PoolStatusTable
children.description: The configuration table of IPv6 address pool's usage.

children.name: hwIPPoolGroupDisplayTable
children.description: Display table of the address pool group.

children.name: hwDhcpSvrGroupTable
children.description:
Configuration table of the DHCP server group.
                 To monitor the status of the remote DHCP server, you need to configure the local DHCP server.
                 You can configure a maximum of 4094 DHCP server groups.
                 Each server group consists of two DHCP servers. Select the server based on the server status.

children.name: hwCUIPPoolStatisticTable
children.description: IPv4 address pool usage statistics list in CU isolation scenario.

children.name: hwDapPoolStatusTable
children.description: The table of dap-server ip pool status.

children.name: hwAllIPv6ConflictAddressNum
children.description: This object indicates the number of conflicting IPv6 addresses on the device.

children.name: hwIpv6AddressUsedTotalNum
children.description: This object indicates the number of IPv6 addresses in use on the device.

children.name: hwAllIPv6ExcludeAddressNum
children.description: This object indicates the number of IPv6 addresses that cannot be used on the device.

children.name: hwDapV6PrefixStatusTable
children.description: The table of dap-server ipv6 pool prefix status.

children.name: hwIPPoolOptionTable
children.description:
A table for configuring options to DHCP server pools,
               include option code type and value and so on .
